name: StructuredWriter

unions.name: Writer
unions.comment: Opaque type which holds the data to be writter

values.name: bracesComma
values.comment: Join writers with commans, enclosed with braces. Puts all things on a new line if the first argument is `True`.

values.name: bracketsComma
values.comment: Join writers with commans, enclosed with brackets. Puts all things on a new line if the first argument is `True`.

values.name: breaked
values.comment: Break a few writers over different lines

values.name: indent
values.comment:
Add indentation of `n` spaces

    write (indent 2 (string "foo")) == "  foo"

values.name: join
values.comment: Join a bunch of writers into one.

values.name: maybe
values.comment: Write something if it is present

values.name: parensComma
values.comment: Join writers with commans, enclosed with parens. Puts all things on a new line if the first argument is `True`.

values.name: sepBy
values.comment:
Join writers with the second value in the tuple and enclose with the first and last. Puts all things on a new line if the second argument is `True`.

    write (sepBy ("<","-",">") False [string "a", string "b"]) == "<a,b>"
values.type: ( String, String, String ) -> Bool -> List Writer -> Writer

values.name: sepByComma
values.comment: Join writers with commas. Puts all things on a new line if the first argument is `True`.

values.name: sepBySpace
values.comment: Join writers with spaces. Puts all things on a new line if the first argument is `True`.

values.name: spaced
values.comment: Join a few writers with spaces

values.name: write
values.comment: Transform a writer to a string
